UpdateBlbSslListener.listenerPort: Port of the listener to update, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbSslListener.backendPort: Listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbSslListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three modes: "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) / "LeastConnection" (least connections) / "Hash" (source IP hash)
UpdateBlbSslListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
UpdateBlbSslListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
UpdateBlbSslListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive failed health checks before the backend server is blocked, default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbSslListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive successful health checks before the backend server is restored to available, default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbSslListener.certIds: Certificate chain to be loaded by the listener; currently only one certificate ID is allowed, if multiple are provided only the last one takes effect
UpdateBlbSslListener.encryptionType: Encryption option, supports: tls_cipher_policy_default / tls_cipher_policy_1_1 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2_secure / userDefind; for corresponding encryption protocols and cipher suites, see: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption)
UpdateBlbSslListener.encryptionProtocols: When encryptionType is userDefind, a list of protocol types composed of combinations of "tlsv10", "tlsv11", and "tlsv12"
UpdateBlbSslListener.appliedCiphers: Cipher suites, see: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption); multiple cipher suites are separated by a colon ":"
UpdateBlbSslListener.dualAuth: Whether to enable mutual (two-way) authentication, disabled by default
UpdateBlbSslListener.clientCertIds: When dualAuth is true, the client certificate chain to be loaded; currently only one certificate ID is allowed, if multiple are provided only the last one takes effect
